pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 195 creates directory structure; task description line 1 specifies file location; verifier.py expects this path
task.json description lines specify 'ID: shortcut_new_note' and 'ID: shortcut_search'; verifier.py lines 90 and 116 validate these exact IDs
task.json description specifies these actions; MainActivity.kt lines 149-150 handle these actions; verifier.py lines 108 and 134 validate these exact action strings

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic Android project at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/QuickNotes with package com.example.quicknotes. The project contains two Vector drawable icons: ic_add.xml and ic_search.xml (created in setup_task.sh lines 218-242). The task requires creating an app/src/main/res/xml/shortcuts.xml file containing two shortcuts with IDs 'shortcut_new_note' and 'shortcut_search', linked to actions 'com.example.quicknotes.CREATE_NOTE' and 'com.example.quicknotes.SEARCH' respectively, both targeting MainActivity. String resources for 'New Note' and 'Search' labels must be added to strings.xml, and AndroidManifest.xml must be updated with a meta-data element linking to the shortcuts file.
